The individual securities in the AFS category shall be marked to market at

The book value of the individual securities

Securities (both domestic and foreign investments) shall be valued individually

Net depreciation, if any, shall
be provided for.
Net appreciation, if any, shall be ignored.

Net depreciation required to be provided for in any one classification shall not

enriched_requirements.object: of net appreciation in any other classification

The individual securities shall be marked to market at monthly or at more

enriched_requirements.object: at monthly or at more frequent intervals and provided for as in the case of those in the AFS category

The book value of the individual securities shall not undergo any change

Special Securities issued by the Government of India
All special securities [Oil Bonds, Fertiliser Bonds, bonds issued to State Bank of
India (during the 2008 rights issue), Industrial Finance Corporation of India and
Food Corporation of India] issued directly by the Central Government shall be
valued at a spread of 25 bps above the YTM rates for Central Government
Securities of equivalent maturities as published by FBIL.
enriched_requirements.object: spread of 25 bps above the YTM rates for Central Government Securities of equivalent maturities as published by FBIL

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
State Government Securities
State Government Securities shall be valued on the basis of the prices / YTM
rates put out by the FBIL.
enriched_requirements.object: basis of the prices / YTM rates put out by the FBIL

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Debentures / Bonds
(1) All debentures / bonds shall be valued on the YTM basis.
enriched_requirements.object: YTM basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Debentures / bonds shall be valued with appropriate mark-up over the
YTM rates for Central Government Securities as put out by FBIL /
FIMMDA.
enriched_requirements.object: mark-up over the YTM rates for Central Government Securities as put out by FBIL / FIMMDA

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(3) The mark-up shall be determined according to the ratings

the following:
i.

For rated debentures / bonds, the mark-up shall be at least 50 basis
points above the rate applicable to a Government of India security of
equivalent maturity.
enriched_requirements.object: basis points above the rate applicable to a Government of India security of equivalent maturity

For unrated debentures / bonds, the rate used for the YTM shall not be

maturity.

enriched_requirements.object: risk borne by the AIFI

Where the debentures / bonds is quoted and there have been
transactions within 15 days prior to the valuation date, the value

been recorded on the exchanges / trading platforms / reporting

enriched_requirements.object: rate at which the transaction has been recorded on the exchanges / trading platforms / reporting platforms authorised by SEBI / RBI

Uday Bonds and Bonds issued by State Distribution Companies (Discoms)
under Financial Restructuring Plan
(1) UDAY bonds shall be valued on basis of prices / yields published by FBIL.
enriched_requirements.object: of prices / yields published by FBIL

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Bonds issued and serviced by State distribution companies (i.e., when
bonds' liabilities are with the state discoms) and which are guaranteed by
state governments shall be valued by applying a mark-up of 75 basis
points on YTM rates for Central Government Securities of equivalent
maturities as published by FBIL.
enriched_requirements.object: a mark-up of 75 basis points on YTM rates for Central Government Securities of equivalent maturities as published by FBIL

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Bonds issued and serviced by State distribution companies (i.e., when
bonds' liabilities are with the state discoms) and which are not
guaranteed by state governments shall be valued by applying a mark-up
of 100 basis points on YTM rates for Central Government Securities of
equivalent maturities as published by FBIL.
enriched_requirements.object: a mark-up of 100 basis points on YTM rates for Central Government Securities of equivalent maturities as published by FBIL

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) Bonds issued and serviced by the State Government (i.e., when bonds'
liabilities are with the State Government) shall be valued by applying a

mark-up of 50 basis points on YTM rates for Central Government
Securities of equivalent maturities as published by FBIL.
enriched_requirements.object: a <image> mark-up of 50 basis points on YTM rates for Central Government Securities of equivalent maturities as published by FBI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Zero Coupon Bonds (ZCBs)
(1) ZCBs shall be valued in the books at carrying cost which shall be

enriched_requirements.object: books at carrying cost which shall be computed by adding the acquisition cost and discount accrued at the rate prevailing at the time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:

reference to the present value of the ZCBs.
enriched_requirements.object: with reference to the present value of the ZCBs

Explanation: The present value of a ZCB may be calculated by
discounting the face value using the 'Zero Coupon Yield Curve', with
appropriate mark up as per the zero-coupon spreads put out by FBIL /
FIMMDA.

enriched_requirements.object: the book value of the bond, before marking it to market

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Preference Shares
(1) The valuation of preference shares shall be on YTM basis.

(2) Preference shares shall be valued with appropriate mark-up over the
YTM rates for Central Government Securities put out by the FBIL.

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The mark-up shall be graded according to the ratings assigned to the

i.

The YTM rate shall not be lower than the coupon rate / YTM for a

enriched_requirements.object: coupon rate / YTM for a Central Government Security of equivalent maturity
rate applicable to rated preference shares of equivalent maturity and shall appropriately reflect the credit risk borne by the AIFI

Where preference dividends / coupons are in arrears, no credit shall be

enriched_requirements.object: dividends / coupons and the value determined on YTM basis shall be discounted by at least 15 per cent if arrears are for one year

The overarching principle should be that valuation shall be based on
conservative assessment of cash flows and appropriate discount rates
to reflect the risk.

Statutory Auditors should also specifically examine

within 15

where current quotations

i.

i.

conditions: if any, shall be ignored and depreciation
if any, shall be recognised
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Appreciation,
if any, shall be ignored and depreciation, if any, shall be recognised, if
the market value is lower than the book value.

Such depreciation shall
not be aggregated for the purpose of arriving at net depreciation /
appreciation of investment under the AFS / HFT category.
enriched_requirements.object: purpose of arriving at net depreciation / appreciation of investment under the AFS / HFT category

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The book
value / market value of the security, whichever is lower, shall be used
to normalise the STRIPS.
enriched_requirements.object: the STRIPS

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Normalisation principle, on stripping / reconstitution shall be applied on
the clean price of the security (without considering the accrued
interest) as the accrued interest is booked as income / expenditure.
enriched_requirements.object: clean price of the security (without considering the accrued interest) as the accrued interest is booked as income / expenditure

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Normalisation shall also be applied in the case of reconstitution (even
when STRIPS are acquired from the market).
enriched_requirements.object: the case of reconstitution (even when STRIPS are acquired from the market)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The book value of the STRIPS (ZCBs) shall be valued and marked to
market as per these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: to market as per these Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Accordingly, the book value of the
STRIPS shall be marked up to the extent of accrued interest before
MTM.
enriched_requirements.object: the extent of accrued interest before MTM

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Repo transactions (including reverse repo transactions) entered by an AIFI
shall be subject to the guidelines specified in Repurchase Transactions (Repo)
(Reserve Bank) Directions, 2018.
enriched_requirements.object: guidelines specified in Repurchase Transactions (Repo) (Reserve Bank) Directions, 2018

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The settlement of transactions in Government Securities shall be
governed in accordance with the guidelines issued by RBI.
enriched_requirements.object: with the guidelines issued by RBI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All the transactions put through by an AIFI, either repo transaction or on outright
basis shall be reflected on the same day in its investment account.
enriched_requirements.object: same day in its investment account

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall follow 'Settlement Date' accounting for recording purchase and
sale of transactions in Government Securities.
enriched_requirements.object: for recording purchase and sale of transactions in Government Securities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In addition to the above-mentioned instructions, an AIFI shall adhere to the
following instructions while investing in non-government debt securities in the
primary as well as the secondary market.
enriched_requirements.object: instructions while investing in non-government debt securities in the primary as well as the secondary market

conditions:
where majority of corpus is
invested in debt securities
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: Non-government securities for this Chapter means securities
issued by corporates, banks, financial institutions, and State and Central
Government sponsored institutions, Special Purpose Vehicles (SPVs), etc.,
units of debt- oriented mutual funds, i.e., schemes where majority of corpus is
invested in debt securities, units of liquid / short term debt schemes (by
whatever name called) and shall also include capital gains bonds.
enriched_requirements.object: bonds

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall invest only in listed non-government debt securities of companies
which comply with the requirements of the SEBI, except to the extent permitted
in paragraphs 71 to 75 below.
enriched_requirements.object: non-government debt securities of companies which comply with the requirements of the SEBI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The total investment in the unlisted non-Government securities shall not exceed
10 per cent of the AIFI's total investment in non-government securities as on
March 31 (June 30 in case of National Housing Bank) of the previous year.
enriched_requirements.object: of the AIFI's total investment in non-government securities as on March 31 (June 30 in case of National Housing Bank) of the previo

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that such investments shall comply with the disclosure requirements
as prescribed by SEBI for listed companies.
enriched_requirements.object: requirements as prescribed by SEBI for listed companies

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that investment in non-government securities (both primary
and secondary market) where the security is proposed to be listed on the
Exchange(s) shall be considered as investment in listed security at the time of
making investment.
enriched_requirements.object: in listed security at the time of making investment

conditions:
in case such security is not listed within the period
specified between issuance and listing
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that in case such security is not listed within the period
specified between issuance and listing, the same shall be reckoned for the 10
per cent limit specified for unlisted non-government securities.
enriched_requirements.object: 10 per cent limit specified for unlisted non-government securities

conditions:
in case such investments included under unlisted non-
government securities leads to a breach of 10 per cent limit
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that in case such investments included under unlisted non-
government securities leads to a breach of 10 per cent limit, the AIFI shall not
be allowed to make further investments in non-government securities (both
primary and secondary market) as also in unrated bonds issued by companies
<image>
engaged in infrastructure activities till such time the AIFI's investment in
unlisted non-government securities comes within the limit of 10 per cent.
enriched_requirements.object: further investments in non-government securities (both primary and secondary market) as also in unrated bonds issued by companies <

conditions:
Provided that such investment is in Securitisation papers issued for
infrastructure projects
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that such investment is in Securitisation papers issued for
infrastructure projects, and bonds / debentures issued by Securitisation
Companies (SCs) and Reconstruction Companies (RCs) registered with RBI.
enriched_requirements.object: Securitisation papers issued for infrastructure projects, and bonds / debentures issued by Securitisation Companies (SCs) and Re

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Investment in units of mutual fund schemes having an exposure to unlisted
securities of less than 10 per cent of the corpus of the fund, shall only be
treated on par with listed securities for the purpose of compliance with the
prudential limits prescribed above.
enriched_requirements.object: par with listed securities for the purpose of compliance with the prudential limits prescribed above

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: Exposure to the unlisted securities for compliance with the norm of
less than 10 per cent of the corpus of the mutual fund scheme, shall not include
Treasury Bills, Tri- Party Repo, Repo / Reverse Repo, and Bank Fixed Deposits
in the numerator.
enriched_requirements.object: Party Repo, Repo / Reverse Repo, and Bank Fixed Deposits in the numerator

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Investment in the following securities shall not be reckoned as 'unlisted non-
government securities' for computing compliance with the prudential limits
prescribed in these Directions:
(1) Securities directly issued by the Central and State Governments, the
units of Gilt Funds and securities directly issued by foreign sovereigns;
enriched_requirements.object: non- government securities' for computing compliance with the prudential limits prescribed in these Directions: (1) Securitie

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and
(11) Unlisted convertible debentures (Investments in these instruments shall
be treated as 'Capital Market Exposure').
enriched_requirements.object: Market Exposure')

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall compute the denominator, i.e., 'total non-government
investments', in the prudential cap stated above, by totalling investments
classified under the following four categories in Schedule to the balance sheet,
viz., 'shares', 'bonds & debentures', 'subsidiaries / joint ventures', and 'others'.

An AIFI shall not invest in non-government securities of original maturity of less
than one-year.
enriched_requirements.object: of original maturity of less than one-year

conditions: Provided that the above restriction shall not apply to investments in CPs
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that the above restriction shall not apply to investments in CPs, CDs,
and NCDs with original or initial maturity up to one year issued by corporates
(including NBFCs), which are covered under the Reserve Bank guidelines.
enriched_requirements.object: CPs, CDs, and NCDs with original or initial maturity up to one year issued by corporates (including NBFCs), which are covered

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall not invest in ZCBs issued by corporates (including those issued
by NBFCs).
enriched_requirements.object: by corporates (including those issued by NBFCs)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that the above prohibition shall not apply in cases where the issuer
builds up a sinking fund for all accrued interest and keeps it invested in liquid
investments / Government Securities.
enriched_requirements.object: the issuer builds up a sinking fund for all accrued interest and keeps it invested in liquid investments / Government Securities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall not invest in Low Coupon Bonds which carry very low coupons
that are not market related and are redeemed at maturity with substantial
premium.
enriched_requirements.object: Bonds which carry very low coupons that are not market related and are redeemed at maturity with substantial premium

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that the above prohibition shall not apply in cases where the issuer
builds up a sinking fund to the extent of the difference in the accrued interest
calculated on the basis of YTM applicable to the bond and the actual coupon
payable on the bond and keeps it invested in liquid investments / securities
such as Government bonds.
enriched_requirements.object: the issuer builds up a sinking fund to the extent of the difference in the accrued interest calculated on the basis of YTM applic

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: An AIFI shall not invest in unrated debt securities.
enriched_requirements.object: securities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that the AIFI shall have the option to invest in unrated bonds of
companies engaged in infrastructure activities, within the ceiling of 10 per cent
for unlisted non-Government securities as referred in paragraph 71 of these
Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: invest in unrated bonds of companies engaged in infrastructure activities, within the ceiling of 10 per cent for unlisted non-Gover

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall undertake repo in corporate bonds as per Repurchase
Transactions (Repo) (Reserve Bank) Directions, 2018.
enriched_requirements.object: bonds as per Repurchase Transactions (Repo) (Reserve Bank) Directions, 2018

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Investment in CPs and NCDs (original maturity up to one year) shall be as per
guidelines given in Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India (Commercial
Paper and Non-Convertible Debentures of original or initial maturity upto one
year) Directions, 2024.
enriched_requirements.object: given in Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Paper and Non-Convertible Debentures of original or initial maturit

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Investment in CDs shall be as per guidelines given in Master Direction -
Reserve Bank of India (Certificate of Deposit) Directions, 2021.
enriched_requirements.object: given in Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India (Certificate of Deposit) Directions, 2021

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Trades in listed corporate bonds shall be executed as per guidelines issued by
SEBI.
enriched_requirements.object: guidelines issued by SEBI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All the secondary market OTC trades in corporate bonds and securitised debt
instruments shall be reported within fifteen minutes of the trade on any of the
stock exchanges (NSE, BSE, and MCX-SX) regulated by SEBI.
enriched_requirements.object: minutes of the trade on any of the stock exchanges (NSE, BSE, and MCX-SX) regulated by SEBI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All OTC trades in corporate bonds and securitised debt instruments shall be
cleared and settled through the National Securities Clearing Corporation Ltd.
enriched_requirements.object: through the National Securities Clearing Corporation Ltd

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall undertake usual due diligence in respect of investments in non-
Government securities.
enriched_requirements.object: in respect of investments in non- Government securities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall ensure that credit facilities for activities / purposes precluded by
the RBI regulations are not financed by way of funds raised through the non-
Government securities.
enriched_requirements.object: for activities / purposes precluded by the RBI regulations are not financed by way of funds raised through the non- Gove

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Except for unrated securities permitted in these Directions, an AIFI shall make
investment in the debt securities with a credit rating of not less than investment
grade from a Credit Rating Agency registered with the SEBI.
enriched_requirements.object: debt securities with a credit rating of not less than investment grade from a Credit Rating Agency registered with the SEBI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Disclosure requirements in offer documents:
(1) The investing AIFI shall file a copy of all offer documents with all Credit
Information Companies (CICs) which have obtained certificate of
registration from the Reserve Bank in terms of Section 5 of the Credit
Information Companies (Regulation) Act, 2005, as amended from time to
time.
enriched_requirements.object: all offer documents with all Credit Information Companies (CICs) which have obtained certificate of registration from the Reserve Bank

conditions: When the AIFI itself raises debt through private placement
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
When the AIFI itself raises debt through private placement, it shall
also file a copy of the offer document with all the CICs.
enriched_requirements.object: of the offer document with all the CICs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The investing AIFI
shall also report any default relating to payment of interest / repayment of
instalment in respect of any privately placed debt to all the CICs along
with a copy of the offer document.
enriched_requirements.object: relating to payment of interest / repayment of instalment in respect of any privately placed debt to all the CICs along with a

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) An AIFI shall disclose the details of the issuer composition of non-
Government investments and the non-performing non-Government
investments in the 'Notes to Accounts' of the balance sheet, as per
Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions - Financial
Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: the issuer composition of non- Government investments and the non-performing non-Government investments in the 'Notes to Accou

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Board shall ensure proper risk management systems are in place for
capturing and analysing the risks in respect of investment in debt securities and
for taking timely remedial measures.
enriched_requirements.object: systems are in place for capturing and analysing the risks in respect of investment in debt securities and for taking ti
of investment in debt securities at least on a quarterly basis: (1) Total turnover (investment and divestment) during the

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall, at a minimum, adhere to the instructions prescribed in this
Chapter for establishing a robust internal control system in respect of
investment transactions.
enriched_requirements.object: adhere to the instructions prescribed in this Chapter for establishing a robust internal control system in respect of investment trans

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(1) There shall be a clear functional separation of (a) trading, (b)
settlement, (c) monitoring and control, and (d) accounting.
enriched_requirements.object: separation of (a) trading, (b) settlement, (c) monitoring and control, and (d) accounting

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) There shall be a functional separation of trading and back-office functions
relating to AIFI's own Investment Accounts, and other Constituents
(including brokers') accounts.
enriched_requirements.object: of trading and back-office functions relating to AIFI's own Investment Accounts, and other Constituents (including brokers'

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) For every transaction entered into, the trading desk shall prepare a deal
slip which shall contain data relating to nature of the deal, name of the
counterparty, whether it is a direct deal or through a broker, and if
through a broker, name of the broker, details of security, amount, price,
contract date and time.
enriched_requirements.object: which shall contain data relating to nature of the deal, name of the counterparty, whether it is a direct deal or through a broker

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The deal slips shall be serially numbered and
controlled separately to ensure that each deal slip has been properly
accounted for.
enriched_requirements.object: controlled separately to ensure that each deal slip has been properly accounted for

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Once the deal is concluded, the dealer shall immediately
pass on the deal slip to the back office for recording and processing.
enriched_requirements.object: deal slip to the back office for recording and processing

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For
each deal, there shall be a system of issue of confirmation to the
counterparty.
enriched_requirements.object: issue of confirmation to the counterparty

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Back-office shall monitor the timely receipt of requisite
written confirmation from the counterparty, which shall include all
essential details of the contract.
enriched_requirements.object: of requisite written confirmation from the counterparty, which shall include all essential details of the contract

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) Checks and balances such as periodic reconciliation of the investment
book not later than once a quarter, procedure for recording, verification
and passing vouchers, contract verification, valuation of portfolios,
monitoring of prudential limits and risk limits, and monitoring of cancelled
deals shall be put in place.

Processes and controls for compliance with
legal and regulatory requirements of reporting deals on various platforms
shall be put in place.

(5) An AIFI shall adhere to the FIMMDA code of conduct while executing
trades in Government Securities on NDS-OM and in the OTC market.
enriched_requirements.object: code of conduct while executing trades in Government Securities on NDS-OM and in the OTC market

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(6) Transactions in Government Securities, money market instruments (call /
notice / term money, CPs, CDs, repo in corporate bonds, and
Government Securities, non-convertible debentures of original maturity
less than one year etc.), derivatives, and other instruments shall be
undertaken as per instructions issued by RBI.
enriched_requirements.object: instructions issued by RBI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(7) Balances of Government Securities as per the AIFI's books shall be
reconciled at quarterly intervals with the balances in the books of Public
Debt Office (PDO), Mumbai.
enriched_requirements.object: intervals with the balances in the books of Public Debt Office (PDO), Mumbai

conditions: If the number of transactions so warrant
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the number of transactions so warrant, the
reconciliation should be undertaken more frequently, say monthly.
enriched_requirements.object: say monthly

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
internal audit department shall periodically check this reconciliation.

(8) An AIFI shall ensure that the stockbrokers as directors on its Board or in
any other capacity, do not involve themselves in any manner with the
Investment Committee or in the decisions about making investments in
shares, etc., or advances against shares.
enriched_requirements.object: as directors on its Board or in any other capacity, do not involve themselves in any manner with the Investment Committee

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(9) An AIFI shall put in place a system to report to the Top Management, on
a weekly basis, the details of transactions in securities, details of
bouncing of SGL, and a review of investment transactions undertaken
during the period.
enriched_requirements.object: system to report to the Top Management, on a weekly basis, the details of transactions in securities, details of bouncing of SGL, and a

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(10) The AIFI's management shall ensure that there are adequate internal
control and audit procedures for ensuing proper compliance of
instructions regarding the investment portfolio.
enriched_requirements.object: adequate internal control and audit procedures for ensuing proper compliance of instructions regarding the investment portfolio

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall, at the minimum, adhere to the instructions prescribed paragraphs
93-100 for engaging the service of brokers.
enriched_requirements.object: adhere to the instructions prescribed paragraphs 93-100 for engaging the service of brokers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(1) An AIFI engaging services of brokers shall ensure that the role of the
broker shall be restricted to that of bringing the two parties to the deal
together.
enriched_requirements.object: of the broker shall be restricted to that of bringing the two parties to the deal together

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that transactions between one AIFI and a bank / other AIFI shall
not be put through the brokers' accounts.
enriched_requirements.object: brokers' accounts

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that the above prohibition shall not apply to securities
transactions undertaken with banks or non-bank clients through members
<image>
of the National Stock Exchange (NSE), BSE (formerly known as Bombay
Stock Exchange) and MCX Stock Exchange (MCX-SX).
enriched_requirements.object: undertaken with banks or non-bank clients through members <image> of the National Stock Exchange (NSE), BSE (formerly

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: The Provident / Pension Funds and Trusts registered under
the Indian Trusts Act, 1882, shall be outside the purview of the expression
'non-bank clients'.
enriched_requirements.object: of the expression 'non-bank clients'

conditions:
if any (if the deal was put
through with the help of a broker)
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The brokerage on the deal payable to the broker, if any (if the deal was put
through with the help of a broker), shall be clearly indicated on the notes /
memorandum put up to the Top Management seeking approval for putting
through the transaction.
enriched_requirements.object: the notes / memorandum put up to the Top Management seeking approval for putting through the transaction

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
On conclusion of the deal, the AIFI shall ensure that the broker note clearly
indicates name of the counterparty and exact time of the deal.
enriched_requirements.object: note clearly indicates name of the counterparty and exact time of the deal

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Its back-office
shall ensure that the deal time on the broker note and the deal ticket is the
same.
enriched_requirements.object: time on the broker note and the deal ticket is the same

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The AIFI shall also ensure that its concurrent auditors review this aspect.
enriched_requirements.object: concurrent auditors review this aspect

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The brokers shall not have any role in the process of settlement of deals.
enriched_requirements.object: the process of settlement of deals

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
settlement of the deal, viz., both fund settlement and delivery of security, shall
take place directly between the counterparties.
enriched_requirements.object: the counterparties

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall not transact in Government Securities in physical form with any
broker.
enriched_requirements.object: in physical form with any broker

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall, with the approval of its Top Management, prepare a panel of
approved brokers which shall be reviewed annually or more often if so
warranted.
enriched_requirements.object: of its Top Management, prepare a panel of approved brokers which shall be reviewed annually or more often if so warranted

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The criteria for empanelment of brokers shall include, at the
minimum, prior experience, creditworthiness, market reputation and details of
regulatory action, if any.
enriched_requirements.object: prior experience, creditworthiness, market reputation and details of regulatory action

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The AIFI shall maintain a record of broker-wise details
of deals put through and brokerage paid.
enriched_requirements.object: broker-wise details of deals put through and brokerage paid

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Prudential Limits
<image>
An AIFI shall ensure that a disproportionate part of the business is not
transacted through only one or a few brokers.
enriched_requirements.object: part of the business is not transacted through only one or a few brokers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The AIFI shall fix aggregate
contract limits for each of the approved brokers.
enriched_requirements.object: for each of the approved brokers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The aggregate upper contract
limit for each of the approved brokers shall be restricted to a limit of 5 per cent
of total transactions (both purchase and sales) entered into by an AIFI through
all brokers during a year.
enriched_requirements.object: limit of 5 per cent of total transactions (both purchase and sales) entered into by an AIFI through all brokers during a year

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that the limit shall be observed with reference to the year under
review and the AIFI shall keep in view the expected turnover of the current year
which shall be based on turnover of the previous year and anticipated rise or
fall in the volume of business in the current year.
enriched_requirements.object: to the year under review and the AIFI shall keep in view the expected turnover of the current year which shall be based on

conditions:
if for any reason it becomes necessary to exceed the
aggregate limit for any broker
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that if for any reason it becomes necessary to exceed the
aggregate limit for any broker, the AIFI shall record in writing the specific
reasons for such breach and the Board shall be informed, post-facto.
enriched_requirements.object: specific reasons for such breach and the Board shall be informed, post-facto

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that the business put through any individual broker or brokers
in excess of the limit, with the reasons for the same, shall be covered in the
half-yearly review to the Board / Local Advisory Board.
enriched_requirements.object: half-yearly review to the Board / Local Advisory Board

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that the limit of 5 per cent shall not apply to dealings through
Primary Dealers.
enriched_requirements.object: Primary Dealers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: This limit shall cover both the business initiated by an AIFI and the
business offered / brought to the AIFI by a broker.
enriched_requirements.object: initiated by an AIFI and the business offered / brought to the AIFI by a broker

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: These instructions shall mutatis-mutandis apply to subsidiaries of the AIFI.
enriched_requirements.object: of the AIFI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall, at the minimum, adhere to the following instructions in regarding
to audit, review, and reporting of investment transactions:
(1) An AIFI shall undertake a half-yearly review of its investment portfolio as
on March 31 and September 30, and place the same before its Board
within two months by end-May and end-November.
enriched_requirements.object: adhere to the following instructions in regarding to audit, review, and reporting of investment transactions: (1) An AIFI shall unde

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The review shall
cover, at the minimum, operational aspects of investment portfolio,
amendments made to the Investment Policy, major irregularities
observed in all audit reports, compliance position thereto and certify
adherence to laid down internal Investment Policy and procedures and
Reserve Bank guidelines.
enriched_requirements.object: operational aspects of investment portfolio, amendments made to the Investment Policy, major irregularities observed in all aud

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: National Housing Bank shall undertake a half-yearly review
(as of June 30th and December 31st) of its investment portfolio and place
the same before the Board within two months, i.e., by end-September and
end-February.
enriched_requirements.object: (as of June 30th and December 31st) of its investment portfolio and place the same before the Board within two months,

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) A copy of the review report put up to the AIFI's Board, shall be forwarded
to the concerned office of Department of Supervision (DoS) by June 15
and December 15 (October 15 and March 15 for National Housing Bank),
every year.
enriched_requirements.object: concerned office of Department of Supervision (DoS) by June 15 and December 15 (October 15 and March 15 for National Housing Bank)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Treasury transactions shall be separately subjected to concurrent audit
by internal auditors and the results of their audit shall be placed before
the Chairman / Managing Director (MD) of the AIFI once every month.
enriched_requirements.object: concurrent audit by internal auditors and the results of their audit shall be placed before the Chairman / Managing Directo

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) The business done through brokers shall be audited by the same
concurrent auditors who audit the treasury operations of the AIFI, and the
audit report shall be included in their monthly report to the Chairman / MD
of the AIFI.
enriched_requirements.object: same concurrent auditors who audit the treasury operations of the AIFI, and the audit report shall be included in their monthly repo

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) The internal audit shall cover the transactions in securities on an ongoing
basis, monitor compliance with the laid down management policies /
prescribed procedures and report deficiencies directly to the
management.
enriched_requirements.object: securities on an ongoing basis, monitor compliance with the laid down management policies / prescribed procedures and report

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall recognize income on accrual basis for the following:
(1) securities of corporate bodies / public sector undertakings in respect of
which the payment of interest and repayment of principal have been
guaranteed by the Central Government or a State Government, provided
interest is serviced regularly and as such is not in arrears.
enriched_requirements.object: basis for the following: (1) securities of corporate bodies / public sector undertakings in respect of which the payment of interest and repayment of principal have been guaranteed by the Central Government or a State Government

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Income from units of mutual funds shall be recognised on cash basis.
enriched_requirements.object: basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall not capitalise the broken period interest paid to the seller as part
of cost and treat it as an item of expenditure under Profit & Loss Account in
respect of investments in government securities.
enriched_requirements.object: interest paid to the seller as part of cost and treat it as an item of expenditure under Profit & Loss Account in respect

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: This accounting treatment does not take into account the tax
implications and the AIFI shall comply with the requirements of Income Tax
Authorities as prescribed.
enriched_requirements.object: of Income Tax Authorities as prescribed

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In the event, provisions created on account of depreciation in the 'AFS' or 'HFT'
categories are found to be in excess of the required amount in any year, the
excess shall be credited to the Profit & Loss Account and an equivalent amount
(net of taxes, if any and net of transfer to Statutory Reserves as applicable to
such excess provision) shall be appropriated to an IRA Account in Schedule -
'Reserves & Surplus' under the head 'Other Reserves'.
enriched_requirements.object: Profit & Loss Account and an equivalent amount (net of taxes

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
IRA shall be eligible for inclusion under Tier 2 within the overall ceiling of 1.25
per cent of total Risk Weighted Assets prescribed for General Provisions / Loss
Reserves.
enriched_requirements.object: under Tier 2 within the overall ceiling of 1

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The amount drawn down from the IRA shall not be available to the AIFI for
payment of dividend.
enriched_requirements.object: AIFI for payment of dividend

conditions:
if any, and net of
consequent reduction in the transfer to Statutory Reserve)
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall have the freedom to utilise IRA as follows:
(1) The provisions required to be created on account of depreciation in the
AFS and HFT categories shall be debited to the Profit & Loss Account
and an equivalent amount (net of tax benefit, if any, and net of
consequent reduction in the transfer to Statutory Reserve), shall be
transferred from the IRA to the Profit & Loss Account.
enriched_requirements.object: utilise IRA as follows: (1) The provisions required to be created on account of depreciation in the AFS and HFT categories shall be debited to the Profit & Loss Account and an equivalent amount (net of tax benefit

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Illustratively, an AIFI shall have the option to draw down from the IRA to
the extent of provision made during the year towards depreciation in
investment in AFS and HFT categories (net of taxes, if any, and net of
transfer to Statutory Reserves as applicable to such excess provision).
enriched_requirements.object: draw down from the IRA to the extent of provision made during the year towards depreciation in investment in AFS and HFT categories (net of taxes

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In
other words, an AIFI which pays a tax of 30 per cent and should
appropriate 25 per cent of the net profits to Statutory Reserves, can draw
down ₹52.50 from the IRA, if the provision made for depreciation in
investments included in the AFS and HFT categories is ₹100.
enriched_requirements.object: of the net profits to Statutory Reserves, can draw down ₹52.50 from the IRA

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The amounts debited to the Profit & Loss Account for provision shall be
debited under the head 'Other Income'.
enriched_requirements.object: head 'Other Income'

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The amount transferred from the IRA to the Profit & Loss Account, shall
be shown as 'below the line' item in the Profit and Loss Appropriation
Account, after determining the profit for the year.
enriched_requirements.object: the line' item in the Profit and Loss Appropriation Account, after determining the profit for the year

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) Provision towards any erosion in the value of an asset is an item of
charge on the Profit and Loss Account, and hence shall appear in that
account before arriving at the profit for the accounting period.
enriched_requirements.object: before arriving at the profit for the accounting period

Explanation: Adoption of the above shall not only be adoption of a wrong
accounting principle but would also result in a wrong statement of the
profit for the accounting period.
enriched_requirements.object: a wrong accounting principle but would also result in a wrong statement of the profit for the accounting period

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall not reckon income on the securities and shall also make
appropriate provisions for the depreciation in the value of the investment in
respect of securities included in any of the three categories of investments
where interest / principal is in arrears.
enriched_requirements.object: securities and shall also make appropriate provisions for the depreciation in the value of the investment in respect of securitie

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall not set-off the depreciation
requirement in respect of these non-performing securities against the
appreciation in respect of other performing securities.
enriched_requirements.object: in respect of these non-performing securities against the appreciation in respect of other performing securities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The criterion used to classify an asset as Non-Performing Asset (NPA) shall be
used to classify an investment as Non-Performing Investment (NPI), i.e., an
NPI is one where interest / instalment (including maturity proceeds) is due and
remains unpaid for more than 90 days.
enriched_requirements.object: an investment as Non-Performing Investment (NPI), i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The above shall apply, mutatis-mutandis, to preference shares where the fixed
dividend is not paid.
enriched_requirements.object: shares where the fixed dividend is not paid

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the dividend on preference shares (cumulative or non-
cumulative) is not declared / paid in any year it shall be treated as due / unpaid
in arrears and the date of balance sheet of the issuer for that particular year
shall be reckoned as due date for the purpose of asset classification.
enriched_requirements.object: / unpaid in arrears and the date of balance sheet of the issuer for that particular year shall be reckoned as due date for the purpo

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In the case of equity shares, in the event the investment in the shares of any
company is valued at ₹1 per company on account of the non-availability of the
latest balance sheet in accordance with paragraph 54 of these Directions, those
equity shares shall be reckoned as NPI.

conditions: If any credit facility availed by the issuer is NPA in the books of the AIFI
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If any credit facility availed by the issuer is NPA in the books of the AIFI,
investment in any of the securities, including preference shares issued by the
same issuer shall also be treated as NPI and vice versa.
enriched_requirements.object: NPI and vice versa

conditions:
where only the
preference shares are classified as NPI
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that this stipulation shall not be applicable in cases where only the
preference shares are classified as NPI, and in such cases, the investment in
any of the other performing securities issued by the same issuer need not be
classified as NPI and any performing credit facilities granted to that borrower
need not be treated as NPA.
enriched_requirements.object: where only the preference shares are classified as NPI, and in such cases, the investment in any of the other performing securi

conditions: In case of conversion of principal and / or interest into equity
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of conversion of principal and / or interest into equity, debentures,
bonds, etc., such instruments shall be treated as NPA ab initio in the same
asset classification category as the loan, if the loan's classification is
substandard or doubtful on implementation of the restructuring package and
provision shall be made as per the norms.
enriched_requirements.object: ab initio in the same asset classification category as the loan

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Government guaranteed investments:
(1) Investment in State Government guaranteed securities, shall attract
prudential norms for identification of NPI and provisioning, when interest /
instalment of principal (including maturity proceeds) or any other amount
due to the AIFI remains unpaid for more than 90 days.
enriched_requirements.object: identification of NPI and provisioning

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) An AIFI's investments in bonds guaranteed by Central Government shall
not be classified as NPI until the Central Government has repudiated the
guarantee when invoked.
enriched_requirements.object: until the Central Government has repudiated the guarantee when invoked

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, this exemption from classification as
NPI shall not be available for the purpose of recognition of income.
enriched_requirements.object: purpose of recognition of income

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The instructions and guidelines already repealed shall
continue to remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been
taken, or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
enriched_requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: by these Directions
affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may

enriched_requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
enriched_requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

conditions: if it considers necessary
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of
any provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.

conditions: Where client / constituent accounts are permitted
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Where client / constituent accounts are permitted, an AIFI shall furnish similar
statements in respect of constituents' Accounts (including Brokers).
enriched_requirements.object: respect of constituents' Accounts (including Brokers)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In the
case of constituents' accounts, the face value and book value of securities
appearing in the relevant registers of the AIFI shall be mentioned under
Column 2.

Details of securities held on physical form (SGL Forms, scrips, letter of
allotment, subscription receipt etc.), if any, may be provided in the footnote.
enriched_requirements.object: footnote
